tracks.title: 🕊️ When Guns Fall Silent — Victory Day Ceasefire 2026 | Epic Orchestral | Assirem Music PROD
tracks.description:
A moment of silence in a world at war — dedicated to every soul hoping for peace.

On May 8-9, 2026, Russia and Ukraine declared rival ceasefires to mark the 81st anniversary of Victory Day. For a brief moment, the guns fell silent. This cinematic orchestral piece captures that fragile, sacred pause — remembrance, hope, and the enduring human dream of peace.

tracks.description:

🇲🇳 Монголын уртын дуу болон хөөмий урлаг. Тал нутгийн салхи танд энхийг авчирна.
